slides.title: Ukufunda kubaKhokeli
slides.lead: Dibana nabakhokeli abane abanesibindi uze ufumanise iindlela ezilungileyo zokuziphatha abanokusifundisa zona.

media.alt: Imifanekiso emine enemibala emileyo kunye phantsi kwelanga eliqaqambileyo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='130' width='320' height='50' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='270' cy='42' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><g><circle cx='70' cy='78' r='14' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='60' y='94' width='20' height='40' rx='4' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='120' cy='72' r='14' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='110' y='88' width='20' height='46' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='170' cy='78' r='14' fill='#3f6b9b'/><rect x='160' y='94' width='20' height='40' rx='4' fill='#3f6b9b'/><circle cx='220' cy='72' r='14' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='210' y='88' width='20' height='46' rx='4' fill='#7a5a3a'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Wamkele iklasi ngobubele. Xelela abafundi ukuba namhlanje baza kudibana nabakhokeli abane bokwenene abavela kwimbali. Chaza ukuba asifundi nje into eyenziwa ngabakhokeli - sifunda iindlela ezilungileyo zokuziphatha ababezibonisa, njengobulungisa, isibindi nobubele. Buza: ngubani umkhokeli omaziyo? Utitshala, umqeqeshi, okanye umzali?

slides.title: Ngubani umkhokeli?
slides.lead: Umkhokeli ngumntu onceda abanye abantu aze ababonise indlela elungileyo yokuhamba.

blocks.text: **Umkhokeli** ngumntu abanye abantu abakhetha ukumlandela. Abakhokeli abalungileyo ababophathi nje. Bayabakhathalela abanye abantu kwaye bazama ukwenza into **enobulungisa** ne **eyiyo**.

items: Abakhokeli abalungileyo bayabaphulaphula abanye kwaye baphatha wonke umntu ngokufanayo.
Banesibindi kwaye bamele into elungileyo, nokuba kunzima.
Singafunda iindlela ezilungileyo **zokuziphatha (values)** kubo, njengokunyaniseka, ububele nethemba.

slides.notes: Gcina ulwimi lucacile kubafundi beBanga lesi-4. Chaza igama elithi 'iindlela zokuziphatha (values)' ngokulula: zizinto ezilungileyo esizikholelwayo kwaye esizama ukuzenza. Bhala amagama ambalwa ebhodini (ubulungisa, isibindi, ububele, ithemba). Abafundi baza kuziphawula ezi ndlela zokuziphatha kumkhokeli ngamnye namhlanje.

slides.title: Nelson Mandela
slides.lead: Inkwenkwe evela emaphandleni eyakhula yaba ngumkhokeli wawo wonke uMzantsi Afrika.

blocks.text: **UNelson Mandela** wazalwa ngo-1918 kwilalana eMpuma Koloni. Usapho lwakhe lwalumbiza ngokuba ngu *Rolihlahla*. Njengendoda wasebenza ukwenza uMzantsi Afrika ube nobulungisa kubantu **bonke**, nokuba babembala mni wolusu.

items: Kudala, uMzantsi Afrika wawunemithetho engenabulungisa ephatha abantu ngokwahlukileyo ngokombala wabo.
UMandela wema echasa le mithetho ingenabulungisa.
Wafakwa entolongweni iminyaka engama-27, kodwa akazange alahle ithemba.

media.alt: Umfanekiso ozolileyo wendoda encumileyo eneenwele ezingwevu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180' role='img'><rect width='180' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='90' cy='96' r='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='90' cy='82' r='34' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M56 78 a34 34 0 0 1 68 0 q-34 -22 -68 0 Z' fill='#e6e1d8'/><path d='M62 118 q28 26 56 0 v40 h-56 Z' fill='#3f6b9b'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ucalucalulo (apartheid) ngobunono nangokulula kubafundi abancinci: kudala, imithetho engenabulungisa yayahlula abantu ngokombala wolusu lwabo kwaye yayingekho luhle. Ungangeni kwiinkcukacha ezinzima. Gxila kwimimiselo nethemba likaMandela. Iminyaka engama-27 entolongweni ibonisa ukuba wayekhathala kangakanani.

slides.title: Uxolelo nobulungisa
slides.lead: Xa uMandela ephuma entolongweni, wakhetha uxolo endaweni yomsindo.

blocks.text: Ngo-1994 uMzantsi Afrika wabamba unyulo lwawo lokuqala apho **wonke umntu** wayenokuvota. UMandela waba ngumongameli wethu wokuqala onyulwe ngokwentando yesininzi. Wacela abantu ukuba **baxolele** baze basebenzisane.

items: Indlela yokuziphatha: **uxolelo** - ukuyeka umsindo ukuze kwakhiwe uxolo.
Indlela yokuziphatha: **ubulungisa** - wonke umntu kufuneka aphathwe ngokulinganayo.
Indlela yokuziphatha: **ithemba** - ukukholelwa ukuba izinto zingaba ngcono.

slides.notes: Le yeyona nqaba yebali likaMandela kubafundi beBanga lesi-4: wayenokuba nomsindo emva kwentolongo, kodwa wakhetha uxolelo noxolo. Buza abafundi: ngaba wakha wamxolela nini umhlobo? Wawuvakalelwa njani? Nxibelelanisa le ndlela yokuziphatha nobomi babo.

slides.title: Mahatma Gandhi
slides.lead: Umkhokeli owabonisa ukuba unokumela into elungileyo ungalwi.

blocks.text: **UMohandas Gandhi** weza eMzantsi Afrika evela eIndiya ngo-1893 ukuza kusebenza njengegqwetha. Apha waphathwa ngokungenabulungisa kuba wayengumIndiya. Oku kwamenza wagqiba ekubeni alwe imithetho engenabulungisa - kodwa **ngendlela yoxolo**.

items: UGandhi wafundisa abantu ukuqhankqalaza **ngaphandle kobundlobongela**. Wakubiza oku ngokuba yi *satyagraha*, okuthetha 'amandla enyaniso'.
Abantu balandela umzekelo wakhe baze bala ukuthobela imithetho engenabulungisa.
Kamva wabuyela eIndiya waza wanceda ukukhokela ilizwe lakhe ukuya enkululekweni. Abaninzi bambiza ngokuba ngu *Mahatma*, okuthetha 'umphefumlo omkhulu'.

media.alt: Umfanekiso olula onezipili ezingqukuva kunye nentonga yokuhamba.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180' role='img'><rect width='180' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='90' cy='96' r='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='90' cy='78' r='30' fill='#c9a37a'/><circle cx='80' cy='76' r='7' fill='none' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='100' cy='76' r='7' fill='none' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='87' y1='76' x2='93' y2='76' stroke='#3a3a3a' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M64 112 q26 22 52 0 v44 h-52 Z' fill='#f0ece3'/><line x1='128' y1='96' x2='128' y2='156' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza i-satyagraha ngokulula njenge 'amandla enyaniso' okanye 'uqhankqalazo loxolo'. Ingcamango ephambili kubafundi beBanga lesi-4: uGandhi wabonisa ukuba unokuba nomeleleyo nesibindi ungonzakalisi mntu. Qaphela ukuba iingcamango zoxolo zikaGandhi kamva zaphembelela uMandela nabanye abakhokeli kwihlabathi jikelele.

slides.title: Inyaniso noxolo
slides.lead: UGandhi wayekholelwa ukuba eyona nto yomeleleyo onokuyenza kukuhlala unoxolo unyanisekile.

blocks.heading: Isibindi
blocks.text: Yiba nesibindi esaneleyo sokumela into elungileyo.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa ezi khadi zintathu njengezinto zokuxoxa. Cela abafundi banike imizekelo yaseklasini: singayisombulula njani ingxabano ngoxolo esikolweni? Singayithetha njani inyaniso nokuba soyika? Yigcine iphathekayo kwaye isondele kwilizwe labo.

slides.title: Chief Albert Luthuli

blocks.text: **UAlbert Luthuli** wayengutitshala wesikolo kwaye eyinkosi yamaZulu. Waba yinkokeli ye-African National Congress (ANC), iqela elalisebenzela amalungelo anobulungisa awo onke amaMzantsi Afrika. NjengoGandhi, wayekholelwa kuqhankqalazo **loxolo**.

items: Ngo-1960 waphumelela i **Nobel Peace Prize** - ibhaso elidumileyo kakhulu labantu abasebenzela uxolo.
Wayengumntu wokuqala waseAfrika owakha waphumelela eli bhaso.
Wafundisa abantu ukuba babe nomonde, bazole kwaye babe nesibindi.

media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 180' role='img'><rect width='180' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M76 40 l-18 44 h20 l12 -40 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M104 40 l18 44 h-20 l-12 -40 Z' fill='#3f6b9b'/><circle cx='90' cy='112' r='40' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='90' cy='112' r='30' fill='#f0c467'/><path d='M90 92 l6 18 h19 l-15 11 6 18 -16 -11 -16 11 6 -18 -15 -11 h19 Z' fill='#b9821f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gxila kuLuthuli njengomkhokeli woxolo owayehlonitshwa kwihlabathi jikelele. Chaza i-Nobel Peace Prize ngokulula: libhaso elikhethekileyo labantu abanceda ukuzisa uxolo. Ukuba ngowokuqala waseAfrika ukuyiphumelela ngo-1960 kubonisa ukuba ihlabathi lalihlonipha indlela yakhe yoxolo. Nxibelelanisa iindlela zakhe zokuziphatha noqhankqalazo loxolo lukaGandhi.

slides.title: Walter Sisulu
slides.lead: Umkhokeli olumkileyo nothembekileyo owakhokela waza waxhasa abanye.

blocks.text: **UWalter Sisulu** wayengumhlobo osenyongweni nomncedi kaNelson Mandela. Wayesaziwa ngokuba **elumkile** nangokunika icebiso elilungileyo. Wasebenza nzima ukuze onke amaMzantsi Afrika aphathwe ngobulungisa.

items: Wanceda abakhokeli abaselula, kuquka uMandela, ukuba bakhule bakhokele.
NjengoMandela, wathunyelwa entolongweni ngokuba wema echasa imithetho engenabulungisa.
Akazange ayeke ukukholelwa kuMzantsi Afrika onobulungisa nokhululekileyo.

media.alt: Imifanekiso emibini emi ecaleni komnye, omnye enesandla egxalabeni lomnye.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 180' role='img'><rect width='200' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='140' width='200' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='70' cy='60' r='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='54' y='82' width='32' height='58' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='130' cy='60' r='20' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='114' y='82' width='32' height='58' rx='6' fill='#3f6b9b'/><rect x='84' y='90' width='34' height='9' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/></svg>

slides.notes: USisulu ufundisa indlela yokuziphatha yokuthembeka, ubulumko nokuxhasa abanye - umkhokeli akufuneki abe ngoyena mntu udumileyo ukuze abaluleke. Chaza ukuba uSisulu wamnceda waza wamqeqesha uMandela. Buza abafundi: ngubani okuncedayo aze akuxhase? Bangamnceda baze bamxhase njani umhlobo?

slides.title: Iindlela zokuziphatha abakhokeli bethu abazabelanayo
slides.lead: Abakhokeli abane abahlukeneyo, kodwa iindlela ezininzi ezifanayo ezilungileyo zokuziphatha.

blocks.heading: Ubulungisa
blocks.text: UMandela wayefuna wonke umntu aphathwe ngokulinganayo.

blocks.heading: Uxolo
blocks.text: UGandhi noLuthuli bakhetha uxolo, hayi ubundlobongela.

blocks.heading: Ububele
blocks.text: USisulu waxhasa waza wanceda abantu ababemngqongile.

slides.notes: Le slayidi ihlanganisa abakhokeli abane. Bonisa ukuba nangona babephila ngamaxesha neendawo ezahlukeneyo, babenazo iindlela ezifanayo zokuziphatha. Buza abafundi ukuba yeyiphi indlela yokuziphatha abacinga ukuba yeyona ibalulekileyo kwaye kutheni. Akukho mpendulo iphosakeleyo - khuthaza ingxoxo.

slides.title: Uhambo ngokuhamba kwexesha

events.label: UMandela uba ngumongameli; wonke umntu unokuvota

slides.notes: Nceda abafundi bafunde umgca-xesha olula ukusuka ekhohlo ukuya ekunene. Bonisa ukuba aba bakhokeli babephila ngamaxesha ahlukeneyo, kwaye ubomi babanye babo bandlalelana. Qaphela ukuba iminyaka ayikho kulandelelwano oluthe ngqo apha ngabom - ungacela abafundi bancede ukuyibeka kulandelelwano oluchanekileyo njengomsebenzi okhawulezayo.

slides.title: Ukuba ngumkhokeli kubomi bakho
slides.lead: Akukho mfuneko yokuba udumile ukuze ube ngumkhokeli olungileyo.

blocks.text: Ungazibonisa iindlela ezilungileyo zokuziphatha ezifanayo naba bakhokeli **yonke imihla** ekhaya, esikolweni nakubahlobo bakho.

items: Yiba **nobulungisa** - yabelana kwaye unike wonke umntu ithuba.
Yiba **nobubele** - nceda umntu osokolayo.
Yiba **nesibindi** - mele umhlobo ophathwa kakubi.
Yiba **nyanisekile** - soloko uthetha inyaniso.

media.alt: Umfanekiso womntwana oncedisa omnye umntwana ukuba avuke, kukho intliziyo ngentla kwabo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='124' width='220' height='36' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='80' cy='60' r='16' fill='#3f6b9b'/><rect x='68' y='78' width='24' height='46' rx='6' fill='#3f6b9b'/><circle cx='140' cy='72' r='16' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='128' y='90' width='24' height='34' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='92' y='92' width='36' height='9' rx='4' fill='#3f6b9b'/><path d='M110 24 a9 9 0 0 1 16 0 a9 9 0 0 1 16 0 q0 12 -16 22 q-16 -10 -16 -22 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Zisa isifundo kubomi babafundi. Le yeyona njongo ye-CAPS: ukufunda iindlela zokuziphatha kubakhokeli nokuzisebenzisa. Cela umfundi ngamnye akhankanye into enye aza kuyenza kule veki ukubonisa indlela elungileyo yokuziphatha. Ungayenza le nto ibe 'ludonga lweendlela zokuziphatha' lweklasi.

slides.title: Phinda uphengulule uze ukhumbule
slides.lead: Phendula le mibuzo ukubonisa oko ukufundileyo ngabakhokeli bethu.

blocks.text: Namhlanje sidibene nabakhokeli abane abanesibindi - **uNelson Mandela**, **uMahatma Gandhi**, **iNkosi uAlbert Luthuli** kunye **noWalter Sisulu** - kunye neendlela ezilungileyo zokuziphatha abasifundisa zona.

blocks.question: Khankanya abakhokeli ababini ofunde ngabo namhlanje kunye nendlela enye yokuziphatha esifundiswa nguye ngamnye.
UGandhi noLuthuli bobabini babekholelwa kwindlela enye ekhethekileyo yokumela into elungileyo. Yayiyintoni?
Bhala malunga nendlela enye yokuziphatha kwesi sifundo nendlela onokuyibonisa ngayo esikolweni kule veki.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa le mibuzo mithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliweyo okanye ingxoxo yeklasi. Umbuzo 1 uvavanya ukukhumbula, umbuzo 2 uvavanya ukuqonda (uqhankqalazo loxolo / ukungabikho kobundlobongela), umbuzo 3 ucela abafundi ukuba basebenzise indlela yokuziphatha kubomi babo, nto leyo ihambelana nenjongo ye-CAPS. Ncoma umzamo uze ukhumbuze abafundi ukuba nabani na angaba ngumkhokeli olungileyo ngokuphila iindlela ezilungileyo zokuziphatha.
